name: io.github.meru-fin-tech/hellobooks-public
title: HelloBooks (Public)
description: Read-only knowledge endpoint for HelloBooks cloud accounting/payroll/tax SaaS. Exposes plan pricing, AI credit packs, integrations catalog, marketing feature catalog data, per-country compliance frameworks, competitor positioning, statutory deadlines, local payment methods, product videos, and a curated catalog of published articles. Plan and credit-pack pricing is federated live from hellobooks.ai.
